title: AI investors may pivot to hyperscalers from chipmakers, Morgan Stanley says
summary: Morgan Stanley said the recent weakness in U.S. semiconductor stocks is a sign that the market ‌gains are broadening, with investors likely to turn toward ‌AI "hyperscalers" as well as consumer discretionary, transport and biotechnology shares. In a note dated ​Monday, the brokerage said hyperscalers — an industry term for tech companies that are spending big on data centers — could benefit from a rotation away from semiconductor stocks as the AI cycle shifts. Although the ‌likes of Alphabet ⁠and Amazon have committed billions to scale up their AI infrastructure, skyrocketing the share prices of semiconductor ⁠companies, clear evidence that AI products can generate returns that justify the spending is yet to be seen.

title: Broadcom Shares Rise After Extending Apple Chip Supply Partnership Through 2031 (AVGO)
summary: Multi-Year Agreement Strengthens Long-Term RelationshipBroadcom Inc. (NASDAQ:AVGO) shares gained 4% on Monday after the semiconductor company announced a long-term extension of its silicon supply partnership with Apple Inc.

title: AVGO Stock Is Rising Today – What's The Apple Connection?
summary: Broadcom disclosed in an SEC filing that it will develop and supply the iPhone maker with a range of custom ASIC chips.

title: Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stocks Are Selling Off, But Taiwan Semiconductor Is Holding Strong. Is It the Ultimate AI Stock?
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor is one of the top AI stocks available.

title: Apple and Broadcom extend custom chip supply deal through 2031
summary: The two companies signed new multi-year agreements for Broadcom to develop and supply custom ASIC chips across multiple generations of Apple products

title: Even Realities raises $150M, hits $1B valuation with smart glasses
summary: The Shenzhen-based startup, founded by a former Apple Watch engineer, is targeting Meta's dominance in the fast-growing smart glasses market

title: Apple veteran's Chinese smart-glasses firm becomes unicorn as Tencent, Meituan fund rival to Meta
summary: The Shenzhen-based startup joined a slew of global peers to build advanced gadgets and electronics that bring the benefits of AI to individual users.

title: Western Digital, Sandisk, AMD, ASML, TeraWulf, Strategy, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
summary: FEATURE Maybe the stock market just needed a long weekend to regain its confidence. Stocks were gaining in premarket Monday with technology stocks among those trading higher. Semiconductor companies were particularly prominent as the artificial-intelligence trade regained momentum.
